reason: The remediation only adds the 'enforce_for_root' directive to /etc/security/pwquality.conf, a standard PAM password‑policy setting. Enabling this does not alter system boot, networking, or filesystem layout and is unlikely to cause lockout because the root account will simply be required to meet the existing complexity rules on its next password change.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; root password complexity enforcement may require password change at next login
